backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with user profile management, video upload, commenting, subscriptions, and access control via authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for build/verification tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Mediatube - Share Your World', loading the Google Identity Services script and the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, GoogleAuthProvider, and LanguageProvider, and includes an ErrorBoundary.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: A popover button component that lets authenticated users add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Ad overlay component that displays a timed banner ad over the video player with a countdown, a skip button that appears after 5 seconds, and auto-dismissal after 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile screens with links to Home, Shorts, Upload, Subscriptions, and Profile, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting filters, zoom, music selection, timer, and multiple duration options for recording short-form video clips.
Displays a list of comments for a video and provides an authenticated comment submission form, requiring Internet Identity for posting.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card with author info, timestamp, optional image attachment, and a delete option for the post owner.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: A composer component for authenticated users to create community posts with optional image attachments, including upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A modal dialog component that allows authenticated users to edit their channel name, handle, and description, with validation and submission via the useUpdateUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: A horizontally scrollable filter bar component that renders selectable filter buttons based on a predefined FILTER_ORDER, highlighting the currently selected filter.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app's display language from a list of seven supported languages using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky top navigation bar with search, auth controls, and a collapsible sidebar, along with a bottom nav and profile setup modal trigger.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom sheet panel that displays a music library for users to preview and select a background track (or none) for their content, managing audio playback via a ref.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A forced-open dialog for first-time users to create their channel profile (name, handle, description, avatar), saving to the backend for Internet Identity users or localStorage for Google users.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Displays a sidebar list of recommended video thumbnails and metadata, filtering out the currently playing video and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: Displays a single full-screen reel video with autoplay/pause based on active state, mute toggle, like button, comment drawer trigger, share button, subscribe button, and view count incrementing.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: A bottom-sheet drawer component that fetches and displays comments for a reel video, allows authenticated users to submit new comments, and prevents touch events from propagating to the parent scroll container.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A button component that copies a video's shareable URL to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a legacy execCommand fallback, showing a toast notification on success or failure.
A subscribe/unsubscribe button that checks the current user's subscription status against a channel's subscriber list and toggles subscription via dedicated hooks, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: A horizontally scrollable section displaying up to 10 trending non-short videos with rank badges, duration overlays, view counts, and left/right scroll controls.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: A video card component that renders a thumbnail preview, duration badge, short indicator, channel avatar, title, view count, and optional subscribe button, linking to either the video page or the reels page.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A full-featured video player component with play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen controls, and an ad overlay shown before long-form video playback.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context provider that manages the user's preferred UI language, persisting the selection to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to add a comment to a video and invalidates the comments query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the backend actor and invalidates related playlist queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that removes a video via the admin backend method and invalidates admin dashboard and video list queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Hook that manages camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder-based video recording, device enumeration, facing mode switching, and elapsed time tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the backend actor and invalidates the API keys query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with an optional attachment and invalidates the community posts query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new playlist with a title and description and invalidates the playlists query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post by ID and invalidates both global and channel-scoped community post queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID and invalidates the playlists query on success.
Query hook that fetches admin dashboard data, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend actor, refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys, enabled only when the actor and identity are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current caller's user profile from the backend, exposing combined loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos belonging to a specific channel principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches comments for a given video ID from the backend.
Query hook that fetches all community posts and returns them sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel principal, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user.
Query hook that fetches the list of videos belonging to a specific playlist.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber principals for a given channel.
React Query hook that fetches trending videos from the backend actor, returning an array of VideoMetadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: React Query hook that fetches a user profile by Principal from the backend actor, returning UserProfile or null.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single video's metadata by videoId from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Provides a React context and hook for Google Identity Services authentication, handling login/logout and persisting the session in localStorage via JWT parsing.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: React Query mutation hook that increments a video's view count on the backend and invalidates related video queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context, provider, and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges on the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a music track with a video blob's audio using the Web Audio API's OfflineAudioContext, returning the mixed WAV blob with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: React Query mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist on the backend and invalidates related playlist queries, showing toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: React Query mutation hook that revokes an API key via the backend actor and invalidates the API keys query, showing toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile to the backend and invalidates the current user profile query.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: React Query hook that searches videos by a search term via the backend actor, only triggering when the term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates the caller's profile avatar by fetching the current profile, merging the new image bytes, and saving it back.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Exports two React Query mutation hooks for subscribing to and unsubscribing from a channel by Principal, invalidating subscriber queries on success.
React Query mutation hook that updates the caller's user profile (name, description, handle, avatar) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a video file to the backend actor with optional progress tracking, invalidating the videos query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: React hook that provides a utility to apply CSS filters and zoom to a video element by rendering frames onto a canvas and returning a captured MediaStream at 30fps.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map (English and Spanish) covering UI strings for navigation, auth, subscriptions, search, community, comments, and media features.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines a YouTube-style dark theme via CSS custom properties, and adds a scrollbar-hide utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query, InternetIdentity authentication, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays platform stats, user list, and video list with the ability to remove videos, accessible only to authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to create labeled keys, view/copy/toggle visibility of existing keys, and revoke them.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Channel profile page that fetches and displays a user's profile, videos, subscribers, playlists, and community posts in a tabbed layout.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community feed page that renders a post composer and a list of community posts with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Renders a static Copyright Policy page with DMCA takedown process details, content ownership rules, and contact information, using i18n translations for labels.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the main video feed with category filter chips and a responsive grid of VideoCards, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state when no videos exist.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Shows a single playlist's details and its videos as a list, allowing the playlist owner to remove individual videos or delete the entire playlist.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Lists all playlists owned by the authenticated user as cards with thumbnails, and provides a dialog to create new playlists.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Renders the authenticated user's profile page showing their avatar, channel info, uploaded videos, and community posts, with support for both Internet Identity and Google auth.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Displays a vertical snap-scrolling Shorts/Reels feed filtered from all videos, with a camera FAB to record and upload new Shorts via CameraRecordingModal.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Displays video search results based on the `q` URL search parameter, showing a loading skeleton, empty state, or a responsive grid of VideoCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Renders a grid of short videos (filtered by `isShort` flag) with loading skeletons and an empty state, linking each card to the reels view.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Shows videos from channels the authenticated user subscribes to, with unauthenticated and empty-subscription states handled separately.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Full video upload form supporting file selection, camera recording, music picking, short detection, and chunked upload progress, with Internet Identity and Google auth support.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Video detail page that plays a video, increments its view count, shows channel info, description, comments, and a recommended videos sidebar.
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines the `FilterType` union, `FilterConfig` interface, and a `FILTERS` record mapping each filter name to its display name, CSS filter string, and icon.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the `MusicTrack` interface and exports a static `MUSIC_LIBRARY` array of five sample tracks with metadata and asset URLs.
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides `convertBlobToDataURL` to convert a `Uint8Array` image to a base64 data URL with MIME detection, and `getInitials` to derive initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports utility functions to format view counts (K/M suffixes), relative timestamps from nanoseconds, and video durations into human-readable strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining YouTube-style and shadcn semantic color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking schema version, feature list, architectural notes, and image requirements for a YouTube-like media app build.
